message:
feat(messaging): local session projection engine with duality verification for two-party protocols

Replaces the ProjectionPlanPlaceholder stub in projection.rs with a full
local session projection engine for two-party global session grammars.

src/messaging/session/projection.rs — Introduces LocalSessionType enum
(Send, Receive, Choice, Branch, Recurse, RecursePoint, End) and
LocalSessionBranch for representing a projected local view of a global
session grammar for one role. Adds project(), project_contract(),
project_pair() public functions that project a two-party global session
grammar into local views for each role. Adds is_dual() which verifies
two projected locals are session-type duals (Send/Receive swap,
Choice/Branch swap, matching labels and recursion structure). Adds
ProjectionError enum for unsupported role count and unknown role errors.
Includes 7 tests: request-reply, streaming (recursion + choice),
reservation handoff (branch), unknown role, invalid role count,
mismatched branch labels, and project_pair duality verification.

src/messaging/session/contract.rs — Integrates projection into contract
validation: ProtocolContract::validate() now calls project_pair and
is_dual, failing with new ProjectionInvariant or ProjectedRolesNotDual
error variants when the projected views are not valid duals.

src/messaging/session/mod.rs — Re-exports LocalSessionType,
LocalSessionBranch, project, project_contract, project_pair, is_dual,
and ProjectionError.

src/messaging/mod.rs — Re-exports new session projection types at the
messaging module level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
